TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Onini San Andreas hananay a ika i, ono pikari'ang tono palapalaan a demak, pasadaken no misaikaay, ci Brad Peyton aci Carlton Cuse, camira a tatosa ko miparatohay tona demak, palaheci nangra a mitilid tonini a demak i, ci Dwayne Johnson, Carla Gugino ato alomanay a matayalay itini tona ika a demakan, tatapangan noni a demak i, pakayni to atol hananay a demak, miri'ang to maamaan tona hekal. Onini a ika, nai 2014 a mihecan saka sepat a folad tosa polo' ira ko tosa a romi'ad a misatapang a matayal, itini i Australia ko pisatapangan, toya mihecaan to saka pito a folad tosa polo' ira ko pito ko kalahecian noni a demak, itini to San Francisco ko pisetekan a pahanhan toni a tayal, Saka tolo to ni Dwayne Douglas Johnson aci Brad Peyton a malacafay midemak a matayal to ika.
S.PHON: o~unini san an…¨~…ģr…ôas ńßananaj a ika i, o~uno~u pikari °aŇč to~uno~u pa…ĺapa…ĺaan a …¨~…ģ…ômak, pasa…¨~…ģak…ôn no~u misaikaaj, ¶i b~b~vra…¨~…ģ p…ôjto~un a ¶i ¶ar…ĺto~un ¶o~u~us…ô, ¶amira a tato~usa ko~u miparato~uńßaj to~una …¨~…ģ…ômak, pa…ĺańß…ô ¶i naŇčra a miti…ĺi…¨~…ģ to~unini a …¨~…ģ…ômak i, ¶i …¨~…ģwajn…ô *o~uńßnso~un, ¶ar…ĺa *o~u~u*ino~u ato~u a…ĺo~umanaj a mataja…ĺaj itini to~una ika a …¨~…ģ…ômakan, tatapaŇčan no~uni a …¨~…ģ…ômak i, pakajni to~u ato~u…ĺ ńßananaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, miri °aŇč to~u maamaan to~una ńß…ôka…ĺ. o~unini a ika, nai **** a mińß…ô ¶an saka s…ôpat a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~usa po~u…ĺo~u ° ira ko~u to~usa a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ a misatapaŇč a mataja…ĺ, itini i ao~u~ustra…ĺia ko~u pisatapaŇčan, to~uja mińß…ô ¶aan to~u saka pito~u a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~usa po~u…ĺo~u ° ira ko~u pito~u ko~u ka…ĺańß…ô ¶ian no~uni a …¨~…ģ…ômak, itini to~u san fran ¶is ¶o~u ko~u pis…ôt…ôkan a pańßanńßan to~uni a taja…ĺ, saka to~u…ĺo~u to~u ni …¨~…ģwajn…ô …¨~…ģo~uo~u~u*…ĺas *o~uńßnso~un a ¶i b~b~vra…¨~…ģ p…ôjto~un a ma…ĺa ¶afaj mi…¨~…ģ…ômak a mataja…ĺ to~u ika.
S.FORM: Onini San Andreas hananay a ika i, ono pikari'ang tono palapalaan a demak, pasadaken no misaikaay, ci Brad Peyton aci Carlton Cuse, camira a tatosa ko miparatohay tona demak, palaheci nangra a mitilid tonini a demak i, ci Dwayne Johnson, Carla Gugino ato alomanay a matayalay itini tona ika a demakan, tatapangan noni a demak i, pakayni to atol hananay a demak, miri'ang to maamaan tona hekal. Onini a ika, nai 2014 a mihecan saka sepat a folad tosa polo' ira ko tosa a romi'ad a misatapang a matayal, itini i Australia ko pisatapangan, toya mihecaan to saka pito a folad tosa polo' ira ko pito ko kalahecian noni a demak, itini to San Francisco ko pisetekan a pahanhan toni a tayal, Saka tolo to ni Dwayne Douglas Johnson aci Brad Peyton a malacafay midemak a matayal to ika.
